response.justification: Wei's 15+ years of software development experience does not align with this specialized embedded networking security role. Critical disqualifying gaps include: no Japanese language proficiency (explicitly required), minimal C programming experience (only 6 months at National Instruments vs. required strong proficiency), and zero background in embedded firmware, networking protocols, or security technologies. Wei's entire career has focused on web/backend development, GIS platforms, and DevOps rather than embedded systems.
strengths: Extensive software development experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded) demonstrating adaptability and technical breadth
Strong DevOps and infrastructure expertise (Docker, CI/CD, GitLab infrastructure) applicable to embedded development environments
Proven commitment to code quality, testing, and TDD practices that would benefit security-critical embedded firmware
concerns: Missing required Japanese language proficiency—a stated non-negotiable requirement for the role
Minimal C programming experience (6 months role at National Instruments); role explicitly requires strong C proficiency for UNIX embedded development
No demonstrated background in embedded firmware, networking protocols (L2/L3), security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X), or Linux kernel work—fundamental to the position

key_factors.factor: Strong C programming expertise for embedded systems
Embedded networking and security technology background
